heading: Sale, exchange, or interchange of National Forest System land
label: 521d Sale, exchange, or interchange of National Forest System land

children.text: to sell, exchange, or interchange by quitclaim deed, all right, title, and interest, including the mineral estate, of the United States in and to National Forest System lands described in ; andsection 521e of this title

to accept as consideration for the lands sold, exchanged, or interchanged other lands, interests in lands, or cash payment, or any combination of such forms of consideration, which, in the case of conveyance by sale or exchange, is at least equal in value, including the mineral estate, or, in the case of conveyance by interchange, is of approximately equal value, including the mineral estate, to the lands being conveyed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Inclusion of terms, covenants, conditions, and reservations
children.label: b Inclusion of terms, covenants, conditions, and reservations

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall insert in any such quitclaim deed such terms, covenants, conditions, and reservations as the Secretary deems necessary to ensure protection of the public interest, including protection of the scenic, wildlife, and recreation values of the National Forest System and provision for appropriate public access to and use of lands within the System.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not be applicable to deeds issued by the Secretary to lands outside the boundary of units of the National Forest System.

children.heading: Deposit in Sisk fund
children.label: 1 Deposit in Sisk fund
children.text: The net proceeds derived from any sale or exchange conducted under paragraph (4), (5), or (6) of shall be deposited in the fund established under .section 521e of this titlesection 484a of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the acquisition of land or interests in land for administrative sites for the National Forest System in the State from which the amounts were derived;

children.label: B
children.text: the acquisition of land or interests in land for inclusion in the National Forest System in that State, including land or interests in land that enhance opportunities for recreational access; or

children.label: C
children.text: the reimbursement of the Secretary for costs incurred in preparing a sale conducted under the authority of if the sale is a competitive sale.section 521e of this title
